sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Platform Classification & Strategic Positioning
required_elements: Drone portfolio classification (Group 1-5 UAS, mission profile, end market)
Business model positioning (hardware-centric, software/data, vertically integrated operator)
Founding team background assessment (defense/intelligence, academic/robotics, consumer tech origin)

sections.title: Regulatory Pathway as Competitive Moat
required_elements: FAA Type Certificate status (stage, timeline, cost implications)
BVLOS waiver and approval timeline (site-specific vs. broad-area)
Remote ID compliance status (post-March 2024 mandatory requirement)
International certifications (EASA, CAAC, DGCA) and market access impact
Defense authorization status (DOD Blue UAS list, NDAA Section 848 compliance)

sections.title: Defense Procurement & Commercial Scalability
required_elements: Defense procurement pathway (R&D contract, prototype, LRIP, FRP)
Contract type and margin profile (cost-plus vs. fixed-price)
Addressable market by Programs of Record and unfunded requirements
Commercial unit economics (cost per flight hour vs. revenue per flight hour)
Fleet utilization rate and maintenance/replacement cycle impact
Dual-use potential and ITAR/export control complexity

sections.title: Technology & Supply Chain Assessment
required_elements: Technology differentiators (autonomy level, sensor payload, endurance, SWAP-C profile)
Supply chain dependencies (Chinese components, semiconductor availability)
Competitive technology benchmarking assessment

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: Pre-profit to early-revenue valuation approach (EV/Revenue, backlog analysis, scenario-based DCF)
Regulatory milestone achievement probability-weighted valuation
Defense contract revenue visibility analysis

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: FAA certification timeline verification with stage-by-stage assessment
Defense budget line-item analysis for relevant programs
Competitive technology benchmarking (autonomy maturity, payload integration)

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Regulatory pathway timeline mapped with clear milestones and cost implications
FAA Type Certificate stage explicitly identified with expected resolution timeline
BVLOS waiver status and jurisdictional coverage detailed
Commercial unit economics explicitly calculated (cost per flight hour bridge)
Defense procurement stage identified (R&D, prototype, LRIP, or FRP)
Dual-use potential and ITAR exposure explicitly addressed
Supply chain dependencies mapped with specific component sourcing risks
Investigation tracks include FAA registry status, DoD budget data, and competitive benchmark sources
